context_for_next_testing_agent: Technical Dossier feature fully tested and working. Endpoint GET /api/fpc/projects/{project_id}/dossier generates merged PDF containing: Cover Page, DoP, CE Label, Materials Summary, Certificates (if any), Welder Qualification (if assigned), FPC Controls. Uses pypdf for merging, WeasyPrint for HTML->PDF. Frontend button 'Stampa Fascicolo Tecnico Completo' triggers download. FPCProjectPage at /tracciabilita/progetto/{id}. Test session active for bridge-test-user.
